ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Mesina for petitioner Maria De Leon.

Mr. Mesina informed the Court that he had just received the revised appraisal from the Probate Referee, and that he needed to submit it to his client by mail to her home in southern California. He requested that the matter be continued for 6 weeks to allow him to communicate with his client and finalize the submission to the court. The matter was continued to September 20, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
